name: olusodotdev/oluso-php
description: AI-powered error monitoring for PHP applications: automatic error reporting, breadcrumb tracking, and intelligent error grouping.

ignore.PKSA-m5cs-t1y6-qpcs: laravel/framework, dev-only via orchestra/testbench (not a runtime dependency of this package); no fix exists in the 11.x line this package's PHP 8.1 floor requires, only 12.61.1+
ignore.PKSA-3r5d-mb8f-1qw9: laravel/framework, dev-only via orchestra/testbench; no fix in 11.x, only 12.60.0+
ignore.PKSA-mdq4-51ck-6kdq: laravel/framework, dev-only via orchestra/testbench; same CRLF injection advisory as PKSA-3r5d-mb8f-1qw9, reported via a second source
ignore.PKSA-8qx3-n5y5-vvnd: laravel/framework, dev-only via orchestra/testbench; fixed in 11.44.1+, tolerated for the 11.0-11.44.0 range this package's tests may resolve to
ignore.PKSA-q46n-4fdk-zjr4: laravel/framework, dev-only via orchestra/testbench; reflected XSS via route param in debug-mode error page, irrelevant to a non-web PHPUnit test harness
ignore.PKSA-qzrn-rnz3-85w1: laravel/framework, dev-only via orchestra/testbench; reflected XSS via request param in debug-mode error page, irrelevant to a non-web PHPUnit test harness
ignore.PKSA-w7xr-vk7n-rstm: laravel/framework, dev-only via orchestra/testbench; environment manipulation via query string, irrelevant to a non-web PHPUnit test harness
